CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Continued To Jan-17-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On November 21,2002.
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on default prove-up. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Deborah Neville. Default entered against Steven Greaves on 3 promissory notes. H. Carole McEwen, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Warren Moore, Vice-Prsident, Recovery for The Education Resources Institute, was excused by the court. Good cause appearing, the Court signs judgment as follows: Principal: 73,147.49, Attorney fees: $3,272.21; Costs: 266.50; for a total judgment of $76,686.20.
